1705780.name: Guinea Pig
1705780.description:
Adopt a new pet and embark on this journey to help him find a safe place and give his new pet an identity.

To achieve such a feat you must go back to the golden age of video games and remember how things were back then (good old days)

* back and forth items
* Platforms with precise jumps
* Move objects around the scene to solve puzzles
* Use physics to your advantage whenever possible
* And when it's time to run you'll know, so run, run like there's no Checkpoint.
1705780.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
